findings.recommended_action: Move static presentation into a shared component class; keep inline custom properties only for live data.

pages.purpose: Main Accountant Dashboard / Finance Command Center.
Main Accountant Dashboard / Finance Command Center.

pages.page_title: Activity Finance Detail - Edify Command Center
pages.purpose: One complete finance view for a single activity.

pages.page_title: Activity Finance Detail - Edify Command Center
pages.purpose: One complete finance view for a single activity.

RETIRED (2026-07-15 finance-unification mandate). This activity-level disburse path shared the same AdvanceRequest rows the canonical weekly/ advance disburse queues (apps.fund_requests.weekly_service.disburse / advance_service.disburse) read from — two live entry points onto the same money was a genuine double-disbursement hazard the mandate explicitly forbids ("no parallel accountability workflows"). Disbursement now happens exclusively through /disbursements (disbursement_dashboard_service) and the weekly advance queue. This route is kept (rather than 404ing) only so old bookmarks/links redirect cleanly; it performs no mutation.

RETIRED (2026-07-15 finance-unification mandate). Letting the Accountant type the NetSuite Expense ID here directly contradicted the canonical rule: the RESPONSIBLE EMPLOYEE completes accountability in NetSuite and enters the resulting ID; the Accountant only verifies it (apps.fund_requests.advance_service.submit_accountability / approve_accountability). Kept as a redirect, not a 404, for old bookmarks/links; it performs no mutation.

Read-only view of activity evidence for Accountants. Gated by the finance page permission — the previous "my_plan" gate excluded the Accountant role this page exists for. Object-level finance scoping (Accountant reaches only money-movement activities) is enforced inside evidence_records_for_activity.

Monthly Fund Request - Edify Command Center

pages.purpose: RETIRED (ecosystem audit). This legacy System-A payout closed the activity directly (finance_services.disburse_reimbursement sets status="closed"), bypassing the canonical ActivityClosureService nine-check gate. No live workflow creates ReimbursementClaim rows any more — self-funded and over-spend reimbursements flow through the advance accountability queue (advance_service.reimburse), which respects closure. Kept as a redirect so old bookmarks fail safely; performs no mutation.

Quality checks — the CD-raised / PL-assigned flag handoff (apps.flags). IA/Admin get the global monitoring view; the CD sees (and raises) the flags they raised; the PL sees (and acts on) the flags assigned to them. Reuses apps.flags.services — the same logic the /api/flags/* endpoints use — rather than re-implementing the raise/acknowledge/resolve rules.

scheduled_jobs.description: Upserts weekly draft FundRequest for the upcoming Mon-Sun.
scheduled_jobs.idempotency_note: fund_requests.services.regenerate() upserts by (week, owner) — safe to re-run.
scheduled_jobs.name: weekly_fund_request

scheduled_jobs.description: Generates next month's MonthlyWorkPlanBudget draft envelope.
scheduled_jobs.idempotency_note: update_or_create keyed on (country_id, month_key) — safe to re-run.
scheduled_jobs.name: monthly_work_plan

scheduled_jobs.description: Escalates stale action-required notifications past a 48h SLA.
scheduled_jobs.idempotency_note: Re-running only re-escalates already-urgent rows to the same state — no-op on repeat.
scheduled_jobs.name: notification_escalation

scheduled_jobs.description: One digest notification per user with unread notifications.
scheduled_jobs.idempotency_note: Deduped per calendar day via a deterministic source_event_id.
scheduled_jobs.name: daily_digest

scheduled_jobs.description: Rebuilds TargetAchievementLedger for every active CCEO/PL so My Targets/Team Targets/CD Analytics never show a stale ledger between page visits (the audit's 'ledger staleness' finding).
scheduled_jobs.idempotency_note: TargetAchievementService.rebuild() is get_or_create per (user, area, source) — safe to re-run.
scheduled_jobs.name: target_ledger_sync

scheduled_jobs.description: Sends due Professional Development pre-course/in-progress/overdue reminders.
scheduled_jobs.idempotency_note: ProfessionalDevelopmentReminderLog uniqueness on (request, key, day) blocks double-sends.
scheduled_jobs.name: pd_reminders

scheduled_jobs.description: Scans recent Field Debriefs for recurring cross-team/cross-country issues.
scheduled_jobs.idempotency_note: RecurringIssueDetectionService.scan() updates the existing open insight instead of duplicating.
scheduled_jobs.name: field_debrief_recurring_issues

scheduled_jobs.description: Delivers due user-configured analytics CSV digests by email.
scheduled_jobs.idempotency_note: Due rows are atomically claimed by advancing next_run_at before network delivery.
scheduled_jobs.name: analytics_report_delivery

quality_score_note: Automated scores are provisional evidence derived from explicit findings and state coverage. A page is not complete until manual visual, responsive and accessibility scores are recorded.
